Trainings

Hands-on workshops for engineering teams on platform engineering, TypeScript, and developer experience.

Trainings

⏱ 👥

Hands-on workshops for engineering teams.

View curriculum →

TypeScript for Teams: From Beginner to Production

⏱ 3 days 👥 JavaScript developers,...

A 3-day intensive workshop taking developers from TypeScript basics through advanced patterns used in production codebases, with a focus on team conventions and tooling.

View curriculum →

Platform Engineering Foundations

⏱ 2 days 👥 Platform engineers, DevOps...

A comprehensive 2-day workshop covering the fundamentals of platform engineering, from defining your IDP strategy to building golden paths and measuring success.

View curriculum →

Developer Experience Masterclass

⏱ 1 day 👥 Platform engineers, team...

A 1-day intensive on measuring, improving, and advocating for developer experience within your organization, using proven frameworks and real-world case studies.

View curriculum →

Ready to upskill your team?

All workshops are available in-person or virtually and can be customised for your team's needs.

Get in touch
